code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> Initializing: start_link(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)

    state Initializing {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)

    %% Session Restoration (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
        - subscriptions: map(HealthTech_PatientRecords)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}
        - last_activity: timestamp(HealthTech_PatientRecords)
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
    IdleTimeout --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {HealthTech_PatientRecords}
        - Fastest: O(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {HealthTech_PatientRecords}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech系统设计一个状态机，核心是LabAnalyzer和EMR_Sync之间的交互流程。先从初始化阶段开始，PatientRecords触发start_link启动LabAnalyzer。
明白，Initializing是一个复合状态。里面EMR_Sync先LoadConfig，然后初始化传输层、建立连接、发送初始化命令，最后等待LabAnalyzer返回initialized消息。这样理解对吗？
对，但WaitForInitialized之后要进入HIPAA_Vault做合规校验，这是医疗数据的强制要求。
好的，Initializing复合状态内部流程已画好。现在Initializing到Connected的迁移条件是收到initialized消息。
Connected状态是核心工作态，里面要有Active子状态。从Active可以分叉到三个操作域：ResourceOperations资源操作、ToolOperations工具调用、PromptOperations提示词管理。
这三个操作完成后都要回到Active吗？还有subscribe_resource这个路径我注意到会进入Subscribing子状态。
是的，所有操作完成后返回Active。订阅比较特殊，subscribe_resource进入Subscribing，确认后回到Active。Subscribing本身也是个复合状态。
Connected复合状态画好了。我注意到需要标注会话持久化机制，在Connected右侧加note说明ETS内存存储、DETS磁盘存储、Mnesia集群三种backend。
Connected还需要几个重要迁移：pause_requested到Paused，可以resume恢复；transport_error进入Reconnecting重连；shutdown notification走GracefulShutdown；critical_error走AbnormalShutdown。
已添加。GracefulShutdown完成后到DiagnosticEngine，AbnormalShutdown完成后到HIPAA_Vault做审计。Reconnecting需要详细设计吗？
Reconnecting是复合状态，内部要有指数退避机制。EMR_Sync触发Backoff，然后尝试重连，成功回Connected，失败则检查重试次数。
检查重试次数的逻辑是：没超限时回到Backoff继续退避，超限了进入Failed状态并通知DiagnosticEngine？
没错。另外给Reconnecting右侧加note，说明故障转移的三种模式：本地进程重启、Mnesia远程副本、DETS恢复加载。
Reconnecting复合状态和故障转移note已添加。现在处理Subscribing的复合状态细节？
Subscribing内部：PatientRecords发起RegisterSubscription，设置Watcher，确认订阅后返回。这是资源订阅的生命周期管理。
Subscribing画好了。GracefulShutdown的复合状态也需要展开吧？
GracefulShutdown由PatientRecords主导：先UnsubscribeResources取消订阅，DrainPendingRequests排空请求，CloseTransport关闭传输，PersistSession持久化会话，最后TerminateProcess结束并回到LabAnalyzer。
GracefulShutdown流程完成。AbnormalShutdown呢？这是异常终止路径。
AbnormalShutdown由LabAnalyzer触发：LogError记录错误，PersistCrashDump保存崩溃转储，NotifyDependents通知依赖方，最后TerminateProcess。
两个Shutdown状态都完成了。ResourceOperations内部需要展开Watching机制吗？
需要。ResourceOperations里PatientRecords进入Watching状态，资源变化时收到NotificationReceived，然后DeliverNotification交付通知，再回到Watching。
ResourceOperations的Watcher生命周期画好了。ToolOperations也有复合结构吧？
ToolOperations是LabAnalyzer执行工具调用：Executing进入执行态，长操作走InProgress，可以发送ProgressUpdate进度更新，完成后到Complete返回EMR_Sync。
ToolOperations复合状态完成。现在补充一些监控和限流的状态迁移？
对。Connected要有periodic_health_check触发SessionValidation，健康就保持，不健康进入Failed。另外periodic_timer触发HealthCheck，全正常保持Connected，子系统故障进入Degraded。
Degraded可以恢复回Connected，如果恢复失败也进入Failed？
是的。还要加IdleTimeout：EMR_Sync无活动时触发，会话过期返回EMR_Sync。以及RateLimited限流状态，超限时进入，退避完成回Connected，持续超限进Failed。
健康检查、降级、空闲超时、速率限制都添加了。需要在Connected右侧加详细的Session State字段说明吗？
需要，列出关键字段：session_id、transport_pid、pending_requests映射LabAnalyzer、subscriptions映射PatientRecords、capabilities、last_activity时间戳、backend类型。
Session State note已添加。Initializing左侧需要backend选择策略的说明吗？
对，在Initializing左侧加note：PatientRecords用ETS最快但易失，DiagnosticEngine用DETS持久但有IO开销，PatientRecords用Mnesia分布式但有CAP权衡。
Backend Selection note完成。Reconnecting右侧还需要补充Restoration Priority的恢复优先级说明吗？
需要，按顺序：恢复订阅、重放pending_requests、恢复capabilities、恢复监控。
Restoration Priority note已添加。整体结构差不多了，需要检查下所有复合状态的入口和出口是否正确。
检查一下：Initializing的入口是PatientRecords的start_link，出口到Connected；Connected的入口是initialized received，出口到Paused/Reconnecting/两个Shutdown/SessionValidation/HealthCheck/IdleTimeout/RateLimited。
验证通过。Reconnecting的出口：reconnect_success到Connected，reconnect_failed到Failed。
等等，Reconnecting内部的Success出口应该是回到LabAnalyzer，不是直接到Connected。让我修正：Success -- [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]，然后LabAnalyzer再迁移到Connected。
已修正Reconnecting内部Success到LabAnalyzer的路径。Failed状态标注了LabAnalyzer参数，表示哪个组件失败。
SessionValidation的unhealthy出口也要标注LabAnalyzer，RateLimited的persistent失败也是。保持标注一致性。
参数标注已统一。现在所有状态迁移都带上了相关组件标识。IdleTimeout的出口标注了EMR_Sync。
最后确认几个细节：PromptOperations目前只是简单列出，保持和ResourceOperations、ToolOperations一样的模式，操作后返回Active。
PromptOperations已确认，list/get操作后返回Active。整个状态机覆盖了医疗数据流的完整生命周期：初始化、连接、操作、监控、故障恢复、优雅关闭和异常处理。
HIPAA_Vault在图中出现了两次：Initializing结束后进入做合规校验，AbnormalShutdown结束后进入做审计。这两次进入的目的不同，需要区分清楚。
理解，Initializing到HIPAA_Vault是启动时的合规准入，AbnormalShutdown到HIPAA_Vault是崩溃后的安全审计。两个入口，场景不同。
DiagnosticEngine也是两个入口：GracefulShutdown正常结束的汇总，以及Reconnecting重试超限后的失败处理。
DiagnosticEngine的双入口已确认。整个图的结构清晰了：PatientRecords作为会话发起方，LabAnalyzer作为执行引擎，EMR_Sync作为协调者，HIPAA_Vault和DiagnosticEngine作为终态汇聚点。
最后检查：所有note的位置——Connected右侧两个（Session Persistence和Session State），Reconnecting右侧两个（Failover Modes和Restoration Priority），Initializing左侧一个（Backend Selection）。共五个注释。
五个note位置全部确认。状态图完整覆盖了HealthTech系统的状态流转，符合MCP协议的医疗场景实现。可以定稿了。
